title: juncus supinus var. prolifer
intro: Juncus supinus var. prolifer, also known as creeping rush or proliferous rush, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Juncaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Juncus supinus var. prolifer include its ability to help alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use as a diuretic to aid in urinary tract issues. Juncus supinus var. prolifer can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, making it a versatile herb for various herbal preparations.
